parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":2048,"system":"You are a brand voice analyst. Analyze 3-5 existing content samples from a client and produce a structured Voice Profile.

Analysis Process:
1. Read all samples twice. First pass: overall impression. Second pass: extract specific patterns.
2. Extract quantitative patterns: avg sentence length (short <12, medium 12-20, long 20+), paragraph length, question frequency, first-person vs third-person ratio, jargon density, metaphor frequency.
3. Extract qualitative patterns: opening style, closing style, emotional register, humor usage, complexity handling.
4. Identify signature patterns — recurring phrases, structural habits, distinctive word choices.
5. Reconcile stated vs revealed voice — if questionnaire says 'Professional' but content is casual, trust content. Note discrepancy.
6. Check consistency across samples. Note platform-specific variation.

Output ONLY a JSON object with this exact structure — no markdown, no explanation:
{"tone": "2-3 descriptors", "formality": "X/5 (description)", "energy": "X/5 (description)", "humor": "specific guidance", "perspective": "primary mode", "sentence_style": "patterns", "paragraph_length": "pattern", "vocabulary": "level", "person": "preference", "reference_blend": "X meets Y", "opening_style": "how to open", "cta_style": "how to reference products", "closing_style": "how to close", "always_use": "terms", "never_use": "banned words", "sensitive_topics": "areas to avoid", "sample_opening_1": "example", "sample_opening_2": "example", "sample_opening_3": "example", "calibration_notes": "confidence and gaps"}

Do NOT produce a generic profile. Every field must reflect THIS client's content. Do NOT default to SeedLink's brand voice. Keep total profile under 600 words.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Analyze the following content samples and produce a Voice Profile.

Client: "+$json.body.client_name+"
Description: "+ ($json.body.company_description || '')+"
Target Audience: "+($json.body.target_audience || '')+"
Stated Voice: "+($json.body.stated_voice || '')+"
Words to Use: "+($json.body.words_to_use || '')+"
Words to Avoid: "+($json.body.words_to_avoid || '')+"

Content Samples:
"+JSON.stringify($json.body.content_samples)}]}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":2048,"system":"You are a brand voice analyst. Take structured questionnaire responses from a client with no existing content and produce a Voice Profile.

Process:
1. Extract natural language patterns from quick-fire answers — sentence length, vocabulary, use of questions, metaphor, emotional register.
2. Map preference pairs to concrete writing rules — don't just note 'casual'; specify what casual means (contractions, fragments OK, rhetorical questions encouraged).
3. Cross-reference with archetype — use selected reference voice to fill gaps.
4. If voice recording transcript present, weight it heavily — spoken cadence reveals more than written answers.
5. Identify contradictions — if 'Professional' selected but quick-fire answers are casual, trust quick-fire (revealed > stated).

Archetype reference:
- Paul Graham: essay-style, first-principles, contrarian
- Sahil Lavingia: casual, transparent, founder-diary
- Lenny Rachitsky: structured, numbered lists, frameworks
- Alex Hormozi: direct, high-energy, sales-oriented
- Julie Zhuo: warm, reflective, design-thinking
- Naval Ravikant: aphoristic, philosophical, minimalist
- Seth Godin: punchy, short posts, provocative questions
- Brené Brown: empathetic, vulnerability-forward, research-backed

Output ONLY a JSON object with this exact structure — no markdown, no explanation:
{"tone": "2-3 descriptors", "formality": "X/5 (description)", "energy": "X/5 (description)", "humor": "specific guidance", "perspective": "primary mode", "sentence_style": "patterns", "paragraph_length": "pattern", "vocabulary": "level", "person": "preference", "reference_blend": "X meets Y", "opening_style": "how to open", "cta_style": "how to reference products", "closing_style": "how to close", "always_use": "terms", "never_use": "banned words", "sensitive_topics": "areas to avoid", "sample_opening_1": "example", "sample_opening_2": "example", "sample_opening_3": "example", "calibration_notes": "confidence and gaps"}

Do NOT produce a generic profile. Every field must reflect THIS client's input. Do NOT default to SeedLink's brand voice. Keep total profile under 600 words.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Generate a Voice Profile from these questionnaire responses.

Client: "+$json.body.client_name+"
Description: "+($json.body.company_description || '')+"
Target Audience: "+($json.body.target_audience || '')+"

Voice Preferences (A/B pairs):
"+JSON.stringify($json.body.preferences || {})+"

Reference Voices: "+JSON.stringify($json.body.reference_voices || [])+"
Archetype: "+($json.body.archetype || '')+"

Quick-Fire Answers:
"+JSON.stringify($json.body.quick_fire || {})+"

Voice Transcript: "+($json.body.voice_transcript || 'Not provided')}]}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({"text":":art: *Voice Profile Generated*

*Client:* "+$('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.client_name+"
*Source:* "+$('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.source+"
*Summary:* "+$('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.profile_summary+"
*Status:* Calibrating — will lock after 2 rounds at ≥ 4/5

"+($('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.calibration_notes ? '*Calibration Notes:* '+$('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.calibration_notes : '')+"

:link: <https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/"+$('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.sheet_id+"|Open Google Sheet>"}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({"success": true, "client": $('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.client_name, "source": $('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.source, "profile_summary": $('Code: Parse Voice Profile').item.json.profile_summary, "calibration_status": "Calibrating", "message": "Voice Profile written to Google Sheet. Status: Calibrating."}) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({"text":":rotating_light: *Voice Profile Generator — Error*

*Error Node:* "+($json.execution?.error?.node || 'Unknown')+"
*Error:* "+($json.execution?.error?.message || 'Unknown error')+"
*Execution ID:* "+($json.execution?.id || 'N/A')}) }}
